reason: Replace conflicting Cape Verde annual progressive-band implementations with the official DNRE Category A monthly gross-income formula, including the CVE 36,607 inclusive threshold, CVE 100 minimum positive withholding, ordinary escudo rounding, and current standard and domestic-service INPS contribution rates. The shared browser engine, server adapter, three public locales, widget, and standalone fallback now use the same reviewed contract.

fixtureDeltas.reason: At CVE 1,000,000 annual gross, the server adapter applies the official monthly gross formula to CVE 83,333.33 per month and calculates employee INPS separately at 8.5%.
The large-value fixture now applies the official 25% monthly formula on gross income and keeps employee INPS as a separate deduction.
